title: [security] unresolved merge conflict in Schnorr MIC signing
description: rust/lichen-link/src/schnorr.rs:191-194 contains git merge conflict markers (<<<<<<< HEAD, =======, >>>>>>>). This affects build_signable() used for link-layer Schnorr48 signatures and MIC verification. Compromises signature correctness and security of L2 frames. Introduced in recent worker2 merge (one of last 20 commits). See schnorr.rs:191 and test vectors.
